sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2009-02-13 23:31:30.0');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = TIMESTAMP '2010-01-01 00:00:00.0' WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, sys.epoch(event_time) + 3600 AS epoch_with_offset FROM test_timestamps;
